name: pesquisaPorMesNota
description: Pesquisa por mes e nota - retorna quantidade por nota por mes
code: SELECT SUBSTRING(P.DATA_RESPOSTA, 1, 7) AS MES, CAST(P.VALOR AS UNSIGNED) AS NOTA, COUNT(*) AS QTD FROM PESQUISAS P WHERE ('{{mes}}' = '' OR SUBSTRING(P.DATA_RESPOSTA, 1, 7) = '{{mes}}') AND ('{{dataInicio}}' = '' OR P.DATA_RESPOSTA >= '{{dataInicio}}') AND ('{{dataFim}}' = '' OR P.DATA_RESPOSTA <= '{{dataFim}}') AND P.DATA_RESPOSTA != '' GROUP BY MES, NOTA ORDER BY MES, NOTA
